title: plan-input
description: Input file consumed by writing-plans/scripts/publish-plan.sh. The agent composes one of these (JSON or YAML) per task; the script validates, then writes the plan to ~/skill-workspace/orchestrator.db. After this hand-off, ALL revisions/updates/deviations are owned by the executing-plans skill.

goal.description: One-sentence statement of what this plan accomplishes. Verbatim into Plans.original_goal.

prefix.description: Short slug prepended to the auto-generated plan_id. Lowercase, hyphens only. e.g. 'auth-refactor' yields plan_id 'auth-refactor-20260514153045'.

max_revisions.description: Circuit-breaker: hard-stop after this many plan revisions. Defaults to 5.

user_query.description: VERBATIM copy of the user's prompt that triggered this plan. Powers the dashboard's user-query panel and is invaluable for post-hoc audit.

project.description: provLedger Phase D: name of a tracked project state-graph (must exist in ~/skill-workspace/project-graphs/projects.json). When set, plan-time forward impact analysis runs synchronously and 'declared_targets' becomes MANDATORY (publish errors out if missing). Omit for plans not tied to a tracked repo.

declared_targets.description: provLedger Phase D: the symbols/columns (qualified_name or name) this change will touch, as the agent judges them. REQUIRED when 'project' is set. Unioned with a deterministic keyword reverse-lookup of user_query; each is verified against the graph (existing -> callers/consumers/dtypes/lineage; missing -> flagged 'new'). The resulting impact_context is stored on the Plan row.

skills.description: Every skill activated to plan/execute this task. Recorded in SkillActivations table for the dashboard's Skills panel. ALWAYS include the iron-law skills (writing-plans, executing-plans, test-driven-development if any code, verification-before-completion if you'll claim done).

name.description: Skill name as it appears in ~/.code_puppy/skills/<name>/SKILL.md

source.description: Why this skill was activated. iron-law = mandatory trigger; auto-search = surfaced by list_or_search_skills; explicit-mention = user named it; deferred-load = activated mid-flight (use record-skill instead in that case).

steps.description: Ordered list of steps. Each entry can be a bare string (description only) OR an object with description + optional metadata. Every CODE step MUST be preceded by a TEST step describing what behavior + edge cases the test covers (see reference/tdd-test-spec.md).

oneOf.description: Plain step description. Convention: prefix with type word, e.g. 'CODE: implement X'.

description.description: What this step does. Be specific: WHO acts, WHAT artifact changes, HOW success is verified. See reference/step-quality.md for the bar.

type.description: Step type for dashboard rendering + audit. See reference/step-types.md.

ctx_estimate_k.description: Estimated context tokens (in thousands). If > 10, MUST be tagged SUB_AGENT. See reference/10k-context-rule.md.
